name: Revivify - Meadow Support
description: Revive your friends with the power of CPR in Rain World, now with Meadow Support! Tap grab in a rhythm while holding a corpse to perform CPR — the more the body moves, the better you're doing! Also includes a Proximity revive option, toggleable in the Remix Menu: just stand near a corpse to revive them, or combine both methods to speed things up!<LINE><LINE>Client-side only — a player needs this mod installed to be revived, but no one else needs it to revive you!<LINE><LINE>Based on Dual's Revivify with Daimyo's Proximity Revivify as a toggleable option.<LINE><LINE>Art by me (Auxiar)<LINE>Source code at: github.com/Auxiar/RevivifyMeadowSupport
